MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ERIC R. GRUBER, Esq. of Gruber Law Group (Tel: 415-868-5297) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff Leroy Fisher;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF LEROY FISHER.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Attorney Eric R. Gruber's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Leroy Fisher is granted.

Mr. Gruber is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the court using the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
